description: Product description Fun Time Original Stimulating Lube 75ml – Clean Comfort for Everyday Moments Fun Time Original Lube is a gentle and water based gel made to support ease, smoothness, and confidence. Whether you're on your own or sharing time with someone, this light and non sticky formula adds comfort without getting in the way. It’s designed for real people and real moments — giving you control, comfort, and peace of mind. Why Choose Fun Time Lube Fun Time is trusted by users for its clean ingredients, natural feel, and reliable results. The formula is body safe and free from harsh chemicals. It offers the right level of moisture without leaving behind stickiness or residue. From everyday use to special occasions, this lube is made to support your comfort in a simple and effective way. When and How to Use Use this product whenever you feel dryness, discomfort, or just want to enjoy a smoother experience. Apply a small amount to the desired area. It spreads easily, lasts long enough for your needs, and rinses off with just water. The compact 75ml bottle makes it perfect for both home and travel use. Feel the Difference Unlike thicker gels or sticky formulas, Fun Time offers a clean glide with a lightweight texture. It enhances comfort without interrupting the moment. You’ll notice the difference in how it feels — soft, smooth, and easy — letting you focus on what matters most. Why You’ll Love It Water based and gentle – Glides smoothly and feels natural on the skin Non sticky and easy to clean – Leaves no mess or stains Made with body safe ingredients – Free from harsh chemicals for worry free use Helps reduce dryness – Adds comfort during personal or shared moments 75ml compact size – Ideal for regular use or travel Compatible with latex and accessories – Flexible for your personal care needs Everyday reliable choice – Trusted by users who value comfort and simplicity Fun Time Original Stimulating Lube isn’t just another gel — it’s your go-to for clean, comfortable, and confident care. Whether it’s once in a while or every day, it’s always ready when you are. Safety Warning This product is not a contraceptive. Avoid contact with eyes, broken skin, or open wounds
